nav.shiftsDisabledTooltip: First create a job to add shifts

welcome.summary: Here is a summary of your activity
welcome.disclaimer: Calculations are based on your preferences
welcome.disclaimerDesc: Sometimes payroll includes other factors that may cause slight differences. This system helps you track your earnings day by day!

liveMode.title: Live Mode
liveMode.needsWork: To use Live Mode, you need to add a traditional work to your profile first.
liveMode.description: Full control of your shifts in real time. Clock in, pause, and monitor your earnings instantly.

export.title: Export Report
export.description: Download a complete summary of your statistics, shifts, and activity

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your experience and manage your account

customization.title: Customization
customization.darkThemeDesc: Easy on the eyes at night

smoko.title: Smoko (Breaks)
smoko.description: Configure the unpaid break time that will be automatically deducted from your shifts.

preferences.title: Payment and Tax Settings
preferences.taxDefault: Default value for all jobs without specific tax.

taxPopover.description: This percentage represents the retention that the company deducts from your gross payment before depositing it.
taxPopover.note: * 15% is a common value for casual contracts, but you should verify your specific case.

turnRange.title: Shift Ranges
turnRange.description: Configure the time ranges for automatic shift type detection. Existing shift tags will be updated automatically.
turnRange.liveModeWarning: Live Mode is active — changes cannot be saved during an active session.
turnRange.nightNote: The night shift extends until the end of the day
turnRange.validationDay: The day shift start time must be earlier than the end time
turnRange.validationAfternoon: The afternoon shift start time must be earlier than the end time
turnRange.validationAfternoonAfterDay: The afternoon shift must start after or at the same time the day shift ends
turnRange.validationNightAfterAfternoon: The night shift must start after or at the same time the afternoon shift ends

holidays.title: Location
holidays.description: Select your location to automatically detect public holidays and activate Working Holiday Visa day tracking (Australia).
holidays.locationDenied: Location access denied. Please allow location in your browser settings and try again.
holidays.locationUnavailable: Location unavailable. Please select your country manually.
holidays.locationTimeout: Location request timed out. Please try again or select manually.
holidays.locationError: Could not access location. Please select your country manually.
holidays.locationNotSupported: Your location could not be matched to a supported country. Please select manually.

delivery.title: Delivery Jobs
delivery.subtitle: Allows registering delivery jobs with variable earnings.
delivery.whatIfDisable: What happens if I disable it?
delivery.whatIfEnable: What changes when I enable it?

shifts.title: Shifts
shifts.subtitle: Manage and visualize your registered shifts.
shifts.noMatchingFiltersDesc: Try adjusting the filters to see more results.

works.title: Works
works.subtitle: Manage your different jobs or employments.
works.name: Name
works.createToTrack: Create a work to start tracking
works.deleteWarning: All shifts associated with this job will also be deleted.
works.deleteWarningDelivery: All delivery shifts associated with this job will also be deleted.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.subtitle: Analyze your performance and projections
statistics.deliverySubtitle: Analyze your delivery earnings and efficiency

weeklyComparison.title: Weekly Comparison
weeklyComparison.tapHint: Tap any row to see current vs last week

shiftTypeStats.emptyText: Add shifts to see this statistic.

platformComparison.title: Platform Comparison
platformComparison.noDataDesc: Data will appear when registering shifts

fuelEfficiency.title: Fuel Control
fuelEfficiency.emptyText: Log fuel expenses in your shifts to see the chart
fuelEfficiency.emptyMin: Add at least 2 shifts with fuel data to display the chart

deliveryHourlyAnalysis.title: Hourly Profitability
deliveryHourlyAnalysis.premiumDesc: Unlock Premium to see which hours and days earn you the most.

insights.title: Your Work Pattern Analysis
insights.recommendation: Based on your recorded shifts, {{bestDay}} during the {{bestPeriod}} is your most profitable window — you average {{bestRate}}/h at your peak. With {{activeDays}} active day(s) of data, the pattern is clear: concentrating more hours during this window will have the greatest impact on your overall earnings. Keep tracking shifts to refine this analysis further.
insights.avoidNote: On the flip side, {{worstDay}} has been your least productive day so far — consider whether reallocating those hours could increase your total take-home pay.
insights.activeDays: Analysis based on {{count}} active day(s) · {{hours}}h of total recorded shifts
